_doc: KARTA Ugniatek (masazer powieziowy 6-glowicowy, plaski owal, 2 uchwyty) — zrodlo prawdy BRAMEK (qa_gate/product_gate). Anatomia = CHECKLISTA, nie tekst promptow. Zrodlo wygladu: FABRYKA-ugniatek/PASZPORT.md + KARTA-PRAWDY.md + wierne kadry landingu (przeszly F3A '2 pary oczu'): packshot-final, spod-packshot, skos-panel, an-makro, df-A/df-B, ugc-1/2/3.

product.nazwa: grey satin cordless fascia massager with six ball heads
product.anatomy_str: a FLAT OVAL cordless muscle massager (rounded-pebble body ~28x16x11 cm) in SATIN SILVER-GREY (soft brushed metallic, NOT mirror chrome, NOT dark graphite); TWO integrated side handles that are cut-out openings in the body with molded RIBBED finger grooves (body and handles are ONE seamless shell); the UNDERSIDE has EXACTLY SIX black matte foam ball massage heads arranged in a 2x3 grid, with a central oval perforated panel of small red-light diodes between them; one long side edge carries a black segmented LED panel (P1..P9 mode readout) plus a power/mode button and small +/- buttons; the smooth top cover has a small neutral embossed 'MASSAGE' word; heads are fixed (not screw-on / not interchangeable); USB charge port on the panel edge, works cordless
product.functional_count: exactly 6 black ball massage heads in a 2x3 grid on the underside (this exact count — never 4, never 8)
product.exactly_one: EXACTLY ONE massager device in the scene; hands hold this one device (never a second massager, never a duplicate)
product._cv_reliable_why: satynowo-srebrny szary = niska saturacja, bliski neutralnej skorze/tlu (playbook gadzet-handsPOV §4: metal/srebrny -> maska HSV bezuzyteczna); w kadrach dominuje skora + neutralne wnetrza. Licznik egzemplarzy i wiernosc = VLM wiersz-na-klatke.
forbidden_leaks: pistol/gun handle, single interchangeable percussion head, set of screw-on nozzle attachments (this is NOT a classic massage gun)
touchscreen or colour LCD (the display is a simple segmented LED readout)
straps, textile grips, charging cradle/stand, carry case
any second colour on the body (body is grey only, heads are black)
mirror chrome finish, dark graphite / gunmetal body (keep SATIN silver-grey)
power cable running to the device (it is cordless)
readable text or numbers on the side panel, glowing UI glyphs, any brand logo (keep panel small / out of focus / illegible)
the word KAJUE, any competitor brand mark, any burned-in price like '$34.98' or promo overlay
fewer or more than six heads; heads changing count or arrangement between shots
second device, duplicate massager in the free hand
elements: korpus_owal — flat oval satin silver-grey shell (rounded pebble), body and handles one seamless piece (NOT a pistol, NOT a rectangle)
uchwyty_2 — TWO integrated cut-out side handles with molded RIBBED finger grooves; ribbing is a factory detail, not drift; exactly two, symmetric
glowice_6 — EXACTLY six black matte foam ball heads in a 2x3 grid on the underside; fixed, same count and layout in every shot
panel_diod — central oval perforated panel of small warm-red light diodes between the heads on the underside
panel_boczny — long black segmented LED display (P-mode) with power/mode button + small +/- buttons on one side edge (keep small / soft / illegible — glyph safety)
pokrywa_massage — smooth top cover with a small neutral embossed 'MASSAGE' word (no other logo)

mechanism_states._doc: Produkt NIE zmienia stanu mechanizmu w scenie — glowice sa stale; ruch = wibracyjne ugniatanie + docisk do ciala + reakcja ulgi. Zadnej ciaglej transformacji mechanicznej (0i doktryna: stan sie nie zmienia -> brak morfu).

model_uzycia._doc: MODEL UZYCIA (twarda bramka, feedback Tomka 22.07): masazer 6-glowicowy — NIE pistolet do masazu. qa_gate/product_gate (KROK 7 pkt 3d) pytaja: czy scena pokazuje POPRAWNE uzycie? Rozroznij scene UZYCIA (glowice do ciala) od beatu REVEAL produktu (glowice do kamery — dopuszczalne jako osobny plan, nie jako 'uzycie').
model_uzycia.interakcja: chwyt OBURACZ za DWA boczne uchwyty; szesc glowic (spod) dociskane DO miesnia (kark=TYL szyi / leddzwie / lydka / udo); glowice ugniataja wibracja, cialo sie rozluznia. FORMA 2 (hands-free): masazer lezy glowicami DO GORY na kanapie, uzytkownik OPIERA sie plecami/leddzwiami (rece luzno na kolanach).
nie_robi: uzycie jak PISTOLET do masazu (jedna reka, pojedyncza wymienna glowica, punktowe uderzenia)
glowice skierowane OD ciala / do kamery w scenie UZYCIA
docisk do PRZODU szyi/gardla (kark = TYL szyi)
trzymanie za jeden uchwyt jak rakietke
model_uzycia.noszenie: trzymany OBURACZ za dwa uchwyty, glowicami DO ciala; albo hands-free pod plecami/leddzwiami (lean, rece luzno na kolanach).

scenography.layout: warm modern home: a cozy living room with a soft couch in warm evening lamp light (relief scenes), and a bright daytime home workout corner with a yoga mat by a window (recovery scene); neutral, uncluttered, no brand props, phone screens dark/blurred
scenography.swiatlo: soft warm evening lamp glow for the relief/couch scenes; clean bright morning daylight for the workout scene; gentle high-key, natural shadows, UGC feel

action_steps: hold the massager by BOTH ribbed side handles and press the six-head underside onto a muscle (nape / lower back / calf)
OR lay the massager heads-up on the couch and lean the lower back / body weight onto it (hands-free) — this two-form use is the product's differentiator vs a massage gun
the six heads knead into the muscle by vibration; body relaxes (shoulder drops, slow relieved breath)
grammar.both_hands: in the press form BOTH hands grip the two side handles; in the lean form both hands rest relaxed on knees; never a second device in either hand
grammar.physics: heads press DOWN into the muscle and knead by fine vibration (no full spin, no 360 rotation of the device); device axis flat against the body zone; nape = back of the neck / upper trapezius seen from behind-side, NEVER the front of the throat

identity._doc: Archetyp hands-POV: brak sledzonej tozsamosci twarzy. Twarze pojawiaja sie WYLACZNIE jako emocja ulgi (profil, oczy zamkniete) w scenach payoff — multi-persona Z ZALOZENIA (inna osoba per strefa ciala), wiec brak wymogu ciaglosci twarzy miedzy scenami; ciaglosc dotyczy PRODUKTU (identity board).

screens_and_text: the device side panel shows a small segmented LED mode readout kept SMALL, soft-focus and illegible; NO readable numbers/letters, NO glowing UI glyphs, NO brand names anywhere; any phone in scene has a dark/blurred screen
